description:
Download the “The Claude Cowork Stack” here 👉https://clickhubspot.com/b98dde

Claude CoWork is here, but the biggest unlock is not just use it alone. The real power is when you connect Claude Chat, Cowork and Claude Code together into your marketing workflow system and know when to use them that make sense. In this video, I'll show you 6 powerful ways to use Claude Cowork for marketing, let's go! 

📌 *Timestamps*
00:00 Claude Cowork is here
00:21 Claude Chat vs Claude Cowork vs Claude Code vs Terminal
01:21 Use Cowork when it make sense
01:34 Claude Project + Cowork for repeatable workflow (Strategy Deck)
05:00 Ad Creatives pipeline automation (with MCP)
07:17 Research Analysis to Deliverables (Growth Research)
09:59 Browser-based task with Custom Skill (Live landing page audit)
12:26 Package workflow into Skills (AI search result tracking)
13:48 Using Official & Custom Marketing Plugins
16:45 Join our AI Marketing System Workshop series

⚡️ *JOIN MY GROWTH COMMUNITY*
https://community.graceleung.com/

📥 *JOIN MY DIGITAL GROWTH NEWSLETTER*
https://www.graceleung.com/newsletter/

🚀 *CONNECT WITH ME*
https://www.graceleung.com/connect/

📂 *RESOURCES MENTIONED IN THE VIDEO*
🔗 Nano Banana MCP Server 
https://github.com/zhongweili/nanobanana-mcp-server 

*Installation guide*
If you are using Claude cowork like me, just use "Option 1: Using Published Server (Recommended)" from that Github repository link, and paste the instruction to claude_desktop_config.json

{
  "mcpServers": {
    "nanobanana": {
      "command": "uvx",
      "args": ["nanobanana-mcp-server@latest"],
      "env": {
        "GEMINI_API_KEY": "your-gemini-api-key-here"
      }
    }
  }
}

🔗 *Lenny's Podcast Episode Transcript* 
https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/yxi4s2w998p1gvtpu4193/AMdNPR8AOw0lMklwtnC0TrQ?rlkey=j06x0nipoti519e0xgm23zsn9&e=1&st=ahz0fj11&dl=0 

🔗 *Claude in Chrome Extension*
https://chromewebstore.google.com/publisher/anthropic/u308d63ea0533efcf7ba778ad42da7390

🖥 *MY GEARS*
https://kit.co/graceleungyl/gear 

👉 *WATCH THESE NEXT* 
🎥 Claude Code for AI Marketing Team
https://youtu.be/0J2_YGuNrDo

🎥 Claude Skills Explained
https://youtu.be/m-5DjcgFmfQ

🎥 PLAYLIST: AI for MARKETERS
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLgvqWBt14woI0bW-qwMn5ZdHtvRHhENcA 

If you like this video, subscribe for more videos like this! https://youtube.com/@graceleungyl?si=J_vzXh3ooLlusD9G

👋 *WHO AM I*
I’m Grace, a Digital Growth Consultant & Educator who is fascinated by anything digital and growth related. I share everything about digital growth, AI for marketing, and personal growth! 

☕️ *Connect with me on Social*
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/grace-leung-yl/ 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/graceleungyl 
Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/graceleungyl
